articles.title: Disorder breaks out in Belfast after man charged with knife attack
articles.description: Police and political leaders call for calm after disorder breaks out in parts of Northern Ireland.

articles.title: David Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
articles.description: The decision followed a safeguarding investigation opened by the the Football Association.

articles.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
articles.description: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.

articles.title: The rebels at the front line of Myanmar's civil war
articles.description: The BBC’s Quentin Sommerville travels to Myanmar - without the permission of the authorities - to meet a group of rebel fighters.
